title: MathNet: a Global Multimodal Benchmark for Mathematical Reasoning and Retrieval
summary: Mathematical problem solving remains a challenging test of reasoning for large language and multimodal models, yet existing benchmarks are limited in size, language coverage, and task diversity. We introduce MathNet, a high-quality, larg...
